description: Defines service-layer responsibilities and prevents business orchestration from leaking into transport or persistence concerns.

rules.name: Services must not build raw API response dictionaries
rules.description: Services must not construct frontend/API transport payload dictionaries.

rules.name: Services must not contain SQL
rules.description: Services must not contain SQL statements or direct database cursor operations.

rules.name: Services must not parse raw request dictionaries
rules.description: Services must receive DTOs/domain objects from route/mapper boundaries rather than raw HTTP payload dictionaries.

rules.name: Services must not manually define API/frontend field names
rules.description: Services must not know camelCase frontend/API field names or manually construct transport fields.

rules.name: Services return domain-level results
rules.description: Services should return domain objects, DTOs, booleans, lists, or use-case result objects rather than HTTP responses.

rules.name: Services should coordinate use cases, not infrastructure
rules.description: Services should orchestrate business use cases and coordinate repositories, validators, domain operations, and infrastructure abstractions without becoming infrastructure implementations themselves.
